hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|env\..*)$|credentials|secrets'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secrets/env files directly. Modify .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(uv\.lock|poetry\.lock|package-lock\.json)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files should not be edited directly. Use uv sync to update dependencies.' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20 && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == src/nic/*.py ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run mypy "$FILE" --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && RESULT=$(uv run ruff check --select C901 --config 'lint.mccabe.max-complexity = 8' "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep C901); if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then echo "WARNING: High complexity (threshold 8, project max 12):"; echo "$RESULT" | head -10; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" != *.py ]]; then exit 0; fi; NEW_TEXT=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.new_string // .content // empty'); if [ -z "$NEW_TEXT" ]; then exit 0; fi; MATCHES=$(echo "$NEW_TEXT" | grep -nE 'except\s+Exception(\s+as\s+\w+)?\s*:' | grep -v '# noqa'); if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then echo "WARNING: Broad except Exception in $FILE:"; echo "$MATCHES" | head -5; echo 'Catch specific exceptions instead. See CLAUDE.md.'; fi

echo 'REMINDER: Always run uv run ruff check && uv run mypy src/nic/ --ignore-missing-imports && uv run pytest -m unit before committing. Use async everywhere. DB has_embedding is integer 0/1 not boolean. Never push Docker images locally.'
